channel.description: Latest Economy and Trade news from The Financial Express Bangladesh

item.title: Use possible LDC graduation extension to boost export competitiveness: Swapan
item.description: Information and Broadcasting Minister Zahir Uddin Swapan has called for making the most of the possible three-year extension to its graduation from the Least Developed Country (LDC) by strengthening export competitiveness, implementing policy reforms, and preparing for post-LDC challenges. item.title: Inflation rises to 9.16pc in June
item.description: The country's rate of inflation rate spiked in June last over its corresponding month last year. Overall inflation stood at 9.16 per cent, up by 0.68 percentage points year-on-year, according to BBS. Food inflation 8.60 per cent while it was 7.39 per cent a year earlier. item.description: Bangladesh must urgently strengthen its export competitiveness and diversify beyond its heavy reliance on readymade garments (RMG) to successfully navigate its graduation from the Least Developed Country (LDC) category, economists and policymakers said on Monday.
